title: IIM Ranchi Gym Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi) has released the official Gym Instructor Notification 2026 on 05 June 2026 at https://www.iimranchi.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIM Ranchi Gym Instructor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Graduate or equivalent degree from a recognized university and rich experience in Gym/Fitness training can attend the walk-in interview on 05 June 2026. The official notification PDF and details for the walk-in procedure are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or its equivalent degree from a recognized university. Rich experience in the field of Gym/Fitness training is essential
qualification.details: Graduate or its equivalent degree from a recognized university. Rich experience in the field of Gym/Fitness training is essential.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIM Ranchi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIM Ranchi recruitment is Gym Instructor.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Gym Instructor post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Gym Instructor post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Gym Instructor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Gym Instructor position is Rs. 15,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Gym Instructor role?
faq.answer: Candidates should be a Graduate or possess an equivalent degree from a recognized university and have rich experience in Gym/Fitness training.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q7. What is the walk-in date for the Gym Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in date for the Gym Instructor recruitment is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Gym Instructor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Gym Instructor post will be through a Walk-in-interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the IIM Ranchi located?
faq.answer: IIM Ranchi is located in Ranchi, Jharkhand, with the pincode 834017.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested copies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).
